channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Four horses die at Cheltenham Festival 2026, including Envoi Allen and Saint Le Fort on final day
item.description: The 2026 Cheltenham Festival concluded tragically with the deaths of two more horses on its final day, bringing the total to four fatalities during the event. Envoi Allen, a 12-year-old legend and thr...

item.title: Barriers Facing Women Entrepreneurs in Accessing Tanzania’s Preferential Procurement
item.description: Women entrepreneurs in Tanzania still face serious challenges when trying to access government procurement opportunities meant for special groups, despite laws designed to help them. According to a ne...

item.title: CTD Conducts Operation in Lakki Marwat, Kills Six Terrorists
item.description: PESHAWAR: The Counter-Terrorism Department (CTD) successfully neutralised six terrorists in Lakki Marwat, Khyber Pakhtunkhwa, during an intelligence-based operation on Friday. According to a CTD press...

item.title: Six Convicted for Robberies Linked to 2015 Killing of Former Kabete MP George Muchai
item.description: Nairobi — Six people have been found guilty in connection with a series of violent robberies, including the fatal 2015 attack that claimed the life of former Kabete MP George Muchai and members of his...

item.title: Why Kharg Island Remains Untargeted in the US-Israel Campaign Against Iran
item.description: Amid the ongoing US and Israeli military campaign against Iran, which has targeted military installations, nuclear facilities, and some oil infrastructure such as refineries and storage sites near Teh...

item.title: Federal Judge Invalidates DOJ Subpoenas Targeting Fed Chair Powell
item.description: A federal judge in Washington, D.C., has quashed subpoenas issued by the U.S. Department of Justice to the Federal Reserve as part of a criminal investigation into Chair Jerome Powell. The probe, led ...

item.title: First Phase of Western Ring Road in Coimbatore Inaugurated for Public Use
item.description: The first phase of the Western Ring Road project in Coimbatore has been officially inaugurated and is now accessible for public use. Tamil Nadu Chief Minister M. K. Stalin launched the 12-km stretch c...

item.title: Epping Forest District Council denied permission to appeal High Court ruling on asylum accommodation at Bell Hotel
item.description: Epping Forest District Council (EFDC) has been unsuccessful in its latest attempt to prevent asylum seekers from being housed at the Bell Hotel in Epping, Essex. The council sought permission to appea...

item.title: Sinesipho Dambile clocks fastest 200m start of the season at Gauteng North Championships
item.description: Sinesipho Dambile opened the season with a bang, running a world-leading 20.06 seconds to win the 200m at the Gauteng North Championships. This marks his quickest season start to date, surpassing last...

item.title: Duterte’s detention at ICC sparks debate between defense and victims’ lawyers
item.description: A year since former President Rodrigo Duterte was detained by the International Criminal Court (ICC) in The Hague, his legal team continues to describe his arrest as a betrayal by the Philippine gover...

item.title: Inspector Alleges 13 Years of Unpaid Salaries Despite Reinstatement by Nigeria Police
item.description: Inspector Ovuomareni A. Eminence, a serving officer of the Nigeria Police Force, don raise alarm say e dey suffer serious injustice from police authorities and the Police Service Commission. Inspector...

item.title: U.S. Expands Trade Investigations to Include Canada Amid Tariff Measures
item.description: The Trump administration has expanded its trade investigations to include Canada, joining a total of 60 countries under review. This move is part of a broader effort to strengthen U.S. tariff policies...

item.title: China's Fuel Export Ban Poses Risks to Australia's Jet Fuel Supply
item.description: Australia is facing increased vulnerability to jet fuel shortages and price hikes following China’s directive for oil refiners to halt all fuel exports. This comes amid ongoing uncertainty surrounding...

item.title: DOTr directs lower airport fees to ease airline costs amid fuel price hike
item.description: The Department of Transportation (DOTr) has instructed the Civil Aviation Authority of the Philippines (CAAP) to lower Passenger Service Charges (PSC) and airport navigation fees across all government...

item.title: Apple Reduces App Store Commissions in China Amid Regulatory Pressure
item.description: Apple has announced that starting March 15, 2026, it will reduce its App Store commission rates in China. The standard rate for in-app purchases and paid app transactions will drop from 30% to 25%. Ad...

item.title: Police Officer Abducted Near Dama Dola Found Dead in Bajaur
item.description: In Bajaur district of Khyber Pakhtunkhwa, a tragic incident unfolded when Shah Munir Khan, a 54-year-old policeman, was found murdered a day after being abducted. According to officials, Munir Khan, w...

item.title: Hyderabad’s Historical and Cultural Links with Persia
item.description: The city of Hyderabad has deep-rooted connections with Persian culture that date back several centuries. From the architecture of iconic structures like Charminar, designed by Iranian immigrant Mir Mo...

item.title: UK Embassy Advises Citizens Against Filming Missile Strikes in UAE
item.description: The British Embassy in the United Arab Emirates (UAE) has issued a warning to British citizens in the region, urging them not to take photographs or share images relating to the impact of Iranian miss...

item.title: SANDF Deployed to Support SAPS in Combating Illegal Mining and Gang Violence
item.description: President Cyril Ramaphosa has announced the deployment of 2 200 members of the South African National Defence Force (SANDF) to work alongside the South African Police Service (SAPS) in five provinces:...

item.title: Trailer Released for ‘Muthu Engira Kaattaan’, a Tamil Mystery Series Starring Vijay Sethupathi
item.description: The much-awaited trailer for the Tamil series ‘Muthu Engira Kaattaan’ has finally been released, creating a buzz among fans of mystery dramas. Helmed by acclaimed director M Manikandan and produced in...
